title: DURABLE MEDICAL EQUIPMENT PROGRAM - 211info
text: ACCESS DURABLE MEDICAL EQUIPMENT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers gently used medical equipment such as walkers, wheelchairs, commodes, crutches, and shower chairs. Accepts donations of new or clean, used medical equipment in good working condition. 3630 Aviation Way Medford, OR 97504 Eligibility: Unrestricted. Individuals will have to sign a liability waiver. Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Email (541) 690-3972 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 690-3972 Chris Kline [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for availability or to make an appointment. Visit website for a list of equipment including items accepted for donation. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Jackson County Services: General Medical Equipment/Supplies Provision Medical Equipment/Assistive Technology Donation Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - COMMUNITY ACTION AGENCY DISASTER SERVICES - CENTER FOR COMMUNITY RESILIENCE FOOD - FOOD PANTRIES FOOD - SENIOR FOOD PANTRIES HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OVER THE TOP WIG PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - AFFORDABLE HOUSING HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMEOWNERSHIP CENTER HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING RETENTION PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - JACKSON COUNTY CONTINUUM OF CARE SCREENINGS HOUSING/SHELTER - RENT DEPOSIT ASSISTANCE HOUSING/SHELTER - WEATHERIZATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SUPPORTIVE SERVICES FOR VETERAN FAMILIES INFORMATION SERVICES - OUTREACH TO SENIORS AND PEOPLE WITH DISABILITIES UTILITIES - ENERGY ASSISTANCE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ACCESS
